title: geum rivale
intro: Geum rivale, also known as the avens or wood avens, is a perennial plant species belonging to the rose family that is native to Europe and Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenes and other compounds. The health benefits of Geum rivale include the potential treatment of wounds, ulcers, and digestive issues, as well as the reduction of inflammation and pain. Herbal preparations of Geum rivale can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
